info.title: BSV MessageBox Server
info.description: Rust reimplementation of @bsv/messagebox-server (Parity++: TS public API + intended behavior, with the TS bugs fixed). All API routes require BRC-103/104 mutual authentication via x-bsv-auth-* headers; /docs, /openapi.json and the ops endpoints are pre-auth. Error responses share the shape {status:'error', code, description}.

post.summary: Store a message for one or more recipients (and push it live)
post.description: Body: {message: {recipient|recipients, messageBox, messageId (string|string[]), body (string|object)}, payment?}. One messageId per recipient. Boxes with a delivery/recipient fee require a BRC-29 payment. Errors: 400 ERR_MESSAGE_REQUIRED | ERR_INVALID_MESSAGEBOX | ERR_INVALID_MESSAGE_BODY | ERR_RECIPIENT_REQUIRED | ERR_INVALID_RECIPIENT_KEY | ERR_MESSAGEID_REQUIRED | ERR_INVALID_MESSAGEID | ERR_MESSAGEID_COUNT_MISMATCH | ERR_MISSING_PAYMENT_TX | ERR_MISSING_DELIVERY_OUTPUT | ERR_INSUFFICIENT_PAYMENT, 403 ERR_DELIVERY_BLOCKED (+blockedRecipients), 500 ERR_INTERNALIZE_FAILED | ERR_INTERNAL_ERROR.

200.description: {status:'success', message:'Your message has been sent to N recipient(s).', results:[{recipient, messageId}]}

post.summary: List all messages in one of the caller's message boxes
post.description: Body: {messageBox}. Unknown box returns an empty list. Errors: 400 ERR_MESSAGEBOX_REQUIRED, 500 ERR_INTERNAL_ERROR.
Body: {messageIds: string[]}. Deletes rows belonging to the authenticated recipient. Errors: 400 ERR_MESSAGE_ID_REQUIRED | ERR_INVALID_MESSAGE_ID | ERR_INVALID_ACKNOWLEDGMENT, 500 ERR_INTERNAL_ERROR.

post.summary: Register an FCM device token for push notifications
post.description: Body: {fcmToken (required), deviceId?, platform? in ios|android|web}. Upserts on the unique fcmToken (re-assigns owner, reactivates, bumps lastUsed). Errors: 400 ERR_INVALID_FCM_TOKEN | ERR_INVALID_PLATFORM, 500 ERR_DATABASE_ERROR.

200.description: {status:'success', message:'Device registered successfully for push notifications', deviceId: <numeric row id>}

get.description: Ordered updatedAt DESC. fcmToken is masked to '...'+last 10 chars; absent deviceId/platform/lastUsed serialize as null. Errors: 500 ERR_DATABASE_ERROR.

200.description: {status:'success', devices:[{id, deviceId, platform, fcmToken, active, createdAt, updatedAt, lastUsed}]}

post.summary: Set a recipient fee / block rule for a sender or box-wide
post.description: Body: {sender?, messageBox, recipientFee} — -1 blocked, 0 always allow, >0 satoshis; omitted sender = box-wide. Errors: 400 ERR_INVALID_REQUEST | ERR_INVALID_PUBLIC_KEY.

get.description: Query: sender? and messageBox. Errors: 400 ERR_MISSING_PARAMETERS | ERR_INVALID_PUBLIC_KEY.

200.description: {status:'success', description, permission?: {sender, messageBox, recipientFee, status: blocked|always_allow|payment_required, createdAt, updatedAt}}

get.description: Query: message_box (or messageBox) filter, limit 1-1000 (default 100), offset >= 0, createdAtOrder asc|desc. Rows serialize snake_case (message_box, recipient_fee, created_at, updated_at) — pinned to @bsv/message-box-client 2.1.0, which reads snake_case (the TS server's camelCase here disagrees with its own client). Errors: 400 ERR_INVALID_LIMIT | ERR_INVALID_OFFSET, 500 ERR_LIST_PERMISSIONS_FAILED.

200.description: {status:'success', permissions:[{sender, message_box, recipient_fee, created_at, updated_at}], totalCount}

get.summary: Quote the delivery + recipient fees before sending
get.description: Query: recipient (repeatable) and messageBox. Single recipient returns {quote:{deliveryFee, recipientFee}}; multiple return {quotesByRecipient, totals, blockedRecipients}. Errors: 400 ERR_MISSING_PARAMETERS | ERR_INVALID_PUBLIC_KEY.

get.summary: Health banner (Rust extension; the TS server has no health route)
Readiness probe — DB (and Redis in Model B) reachable, not draining (Rust extension)
